---
title: Mapping Celestia's Network
---

*"The Lord has been and is very kind to me in giving me so many friends may I ever be grateful for all his benefits."*

**Celestia Webster's Diary - May 17, 1867**

```{r}
library(sf)
library(tidygeocoder)
library(USAboundaries)
library(tidyverse)

# Geocode Locations

locations <- geo(c("Conesus", "Hemlock", "Springwater", "Livonia"))
locations

# Convert locations to sf
locations_sf <- st_as_sf(locations, coords = c("long", "lat"), crs = 4326)
locations_sf

# Get a Base Map
newyork <- us_counties(states = "New York")

# Find EPSG code for Virginia
state_plane(state = "NY")

# Reproject the data 
locs_proj <- st_transform(locs, "EPSG:32116")
newyork_proj <- st_transform (newyork, "EPSG:32116")

# Map the data
ggplot() + 
  geom_sf(data = newyork_proj) + 
  labs(title = "Map of New York counties",
       subtitle = "With points showing the locations of Conesus, Hemlock, Springwater,Livonia") + 
  theme_minimal()

  
```
